meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Expert Guide)
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup to build high-end SaaS applications faster. Your intermediate-level roadmap.
content.answer_block: To evolve beyond basic apps, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate architectural scaffolding and complex refactoring. By mapping your codebase context through Claude’s CLI and enforcing structural standards via Antigravity prompts, you transform from a manual coder into a high-leverage AI orchestrator, shipping production-grade SaaS in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project starts with a clean slate, but soon devolves into a spaghetti-code mess that kills your velocity. You’re shipping basic CRUD apps while your clients demand scalable, AI-integrated architecture. The gap between your current output and your potential isn't talent—it's the friction of manual implementation.

It’s time to stop fighting your editor and start commanding it. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you shift the burden of boilerplate and structural complexity to the machine. This is the precise moment you stop building 'apps' and start engineering high-value, performant SaaS products with surgical precision.

steps.title: Context Injection and Environment Mapping
steps.description: Establish a deep understanding of your project structure so the AI doesn't hallucinate irrelevant patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory structure and define the architectural pattern. Identify dependencies and establish a 'source of truth' document for the project's core business logic.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding of Core Features
steps.description: Use AI to generate type-safe endpoints that conform to your existing architectural standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD service layer for the new feature based on the existing repository pattern. Ensure full TypeScript coverage and strict error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create service layer for user-authentication module following clean architecture'

steps.title: Refactoring Legacy Debt into Modular Logic
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks in your existing code and refactor them into reusable, clean modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current utility functions for performance bottlenecks and propose a modular refactor that adheres to SOLID principles.

steps.title: Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Don't write tests manually. Generate the test suite based on the business requirements you just defined.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest integration tests for the newly created service layer, covering edge cases for database latency and invalid input handling.

steps.title: Production-Grade Documentation Sync
steps.description: Ensure your documentation stays as current as your code by automating the readme generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the project README.md to reflect the new API endpoints and authentication flow, including a 'How to Deploy' section.

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive build directories or sensitive secrets.
Chain your prompts: use the output of an Antigravity analysis as the input for your next Claude Code execution command.
Set your Claude Code 'temperature' low (0.1) for refactoring tasks to ensure consistency and prevent structural hallucinations.
Use 'dry-run' flags whenever available before committing AI-generated refactors to your main branch.
Treat the AI as a junior developer: review the generated code for 'magic numbers' or hardcoded values before merging.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is optimized, start mapping your next feature request into a series of Antigravity tasks to maintain your new velocity.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to outpace the competition. Stop building basic apps and start shipping enterprise-grade solutions. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
